chapters.content_preview: Chapter 4  The various Kinds of Strengths of Planets and Houses  This Chapter deals with as to how to assess the strength of the planets and houses (bhavas). In this connection before mentioning the view of Shri Mantreswara, it will be useful to know the views of other ancients.

chapters.title: Drik bala (Directional strength)
chapters.content_preview: Drik bala (Directional strength)  (a) Amongst the Sun and Mars, whoever Is the 10th Bhava madhya (South) gets 1 Rupja strength. Their strength is nil if they are located in the 4th Bhava madhya. In the intervening locations, the strength has to be calculated proportionately.  (b)

chapters.title: Kala Bala
chapters.content_preview: Kala Bala  This is admixture of the kinds of strength as described below: —  (1) (a) The Sun, Jupiter and Venus get 1 Rupa of strength exactly at mid- noon. Exactly at mid-night they are devoid of any strength. For the intervening periods the strength has to be calculated proport

chapters.title: Naisargik Bala (Inherent strength)
chapters.content_preview: Naisargik Bala (Inherent strength)  This strength is inherent in the planet and never changes.  The Naisargik Bala of the Sun is 60 Shastayamsa, of the Moon 51.3, of Venus 42.85, of Jupiter 34.28, of Mercury 25.70, of Mars 17.14 and of Saturn 8.57 Shastayamsa.

chapters.title: Drig Bala
chapters.content_preview: Drig Bala  This kind of strength is derived from aspect. If a planet is aspected by benefics, the aspect is considered as benefic (favourable). To work out the strength of aspect, the difference in degrees etc., of the aspecting and aspected planet has to be worked out arithmetic

chapters.title: Bhava Dik Bala

If they be in the 7th, the strength will be nil. For the intervening houses, the strength has to be worked out proportionately

chapters.title: In 120 years the duration is 6 years
chapters.content_preview: In 120 years the duration is 6 years  In 1 year it will be (6*1/120) = 1/20 years  (1/20)*360 days = 18 days.  Thus in the dasa of Venus, the duration of the pratyantar dasa of the Sun in his antar dasa will be 18 days.

chapters.title: The Lattas are of two kinds
chapters.content_preview: The Lattas are of two kinds  (1) Forward or puro Lattas and (2) Rear or Prishta Lattas. The Lattas of the Sun, Mars, Jupiter and Saturn belong to the former clan.
